_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the Time Rich offer. Edit here, then run: node "TR Landing Page/sync-offer.mjs" to re-propagate into the T&Cs, privacy page, sales pages, and the reviewed coaching contract. See OFFER-SYNC-README.md.
_todo: refundWindowDays: CONFIRMED 14 by Ella (2026-07-11). Live challenge/terms.html + /contentmachine refund FAQ both state 14-day refund and are in sync. [lawyer review of the immediate-access waiver interaction still pending]

tiers prices: canonical docs + spec set these at $197 / $295 / $395. The live /contentmachine page currently shows $297 and $495 (drift). Confirm the true tier prices, then let sync-offer.mjs re-propagate them.
doorsClose: set to 2026-09-01 per canonical README + memory. The live /contentmachine page says 'Sept 4' (drift). Confirm the true doors-close date.
stripeLinks: empty placeholder. Add the three tier checkout URLs (contentOs / writtenMachine / fullMachine) and any coaching application link once live.
coaching tier names: sourced from spec §3 ('6-Week 1:1 AI System Coaching', '12-Week 1:1 COO AI Coaching'). Confirm these are the final public names.

date display keys (doorsCloseDisplay/Short, startDateDisplay/Short): human-readable forms of doorsClose/startDate. sync-offer.mjs does literal string replacement, so pages that show '1 September' must reference these display keys, NOT the raw ISO doorsClose. If you change doorsClose/startDate, update these four display keys to match.
